candidateSets.description: Practise Candidate A photographs and Candidate A short response.

stages.title: Candidate A - Long turn
stages.description: Compare your two photographs and answer the question.
questions: The photographs show people spending time outdoors.
Compare the photographs and say why the people might be enjoying these activities.
helpScript: In the first picture, I can see...
In the second picture, there is...
Both pictures show...
One clear difference is that...
The people might be enjoying it because...
Compared with the first picture...

stages.title: Candidate A - Short response
stages.description: Answer a short question about Candidate B's photographs.
questions: Which of these learning situations do you think is more useful for young people? Why?
helpScript: I think the first / second situation is more useful because...
In my opinion...
It might help young people to...
I would choose this one because...

candidateSets.description: Practise Candidate B photographs and Candidate B short response.

stages.title: Candidate B - Long turn
stages.description: Compare your two photographs and answer the question.
questions: The photographs show people learning something.
Compare the photographs and say how useful these learning experiences might be.
helpScript: In the first picture, I can see...
In the second picture, there is...
Both photographs are connected because...
One important difference is that...
This experience might be useful because...
Compared with the second picture...

stages.title: Candidate B - Short response
stages.description: Answer a short question about Candidate A's photographs.
questions: Which of these outdoor activities do you think is more relaxing? Why?
helpScript: I think the first / second activity is more relaxing because...
It looks more...
The people seem to be...
I would prefer this activity because...
